report.summary: SEC ETF ruling day arrives: BTC holds ~$66,587 (-5.5% from Mar 25), ETH slips to $1,989, F&G crashes to 9-13 (Extreme Fear). All 6 agents completed a full cycle today — 2 new learn pages built (Virtuals Protocol, GRASS), 5 pages published from backlog, 12 UX fixes, 5 social drafts. 157 uncommitted files remain the critical blocker. Disk at 82% (1.8G free — tightening).

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,587 (stable vs earlier standup — no further drop). Down -5.5% from Mar 25 ($70,525). $20,660 lower YoY. Market cap $1.33T.
ETH: $1,988.69 (NEW LOW — dropped below $2K for first time this cycle). Down from $2,027-$2,118 in last standup. OG whale dumped 11,552 ETH ($23.4M) accelerating the slide.
F&G INDEX: 9-13 (Extreme Fear) — DOWN from 13-29 in last standup. Multiple sources now reading single digits. Lowest since Oct 2025. 48+ day fear streak extends.
ETF FLOWS: -$171.3M net outflows on Mar 26 (unchanged from last cycle). Mar 24 had +$180M inflows — whipsaw pattern. March total flows down 73% vs Feb ($890M vs $3.3B).

SEC ETF RULING — TODAY: 91 applications, 24 tokens. Expect mixed outcomes: approvals for commodity-classified tokens with CME futures history, extensions/rejections for others. 16 cryptos already classified as commodities (Mar 17 joint ruling). XRP $1.44B pre-inflows.
OPTIONS EXPIRY — SETTLED: $14.16B expired at 08:00 UTC. Max pain was $75K (BTC $9K below). Post-settlement volatility playing out — ETH broke $2K support.
DELTA FROM LAST STANDUP: ETH broke $2K (was $2,027-$2,118). F&G dropped further (9 vs 13). BTC flat. Options settled. SEC ruling imminent. All 6 agents ran (was 1 of 6 last standup).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: FULL CYCLE COMPLETED: All 6 agents ran today — standup, build, publish, design, community, eod-qa (×2). First full rotation since Mar 25.

BUILD CYCLE: 2 new learn pages scaffolded — Virtuals Protocol (VIRTUAL) AI agent guide and GRASS Protocol DePIN guide. Both SEO-optimized with JSON-LD, FAQ schemas, internal links. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

PUBLISH CYCLE: 5 pages promoted from backlog — loan calculator, LTV calculator, best bitcoin exchanges, best USA exchanges, crypto card comparison. Total published: 534→539 (but published-pages.ts shows 554 in eod report — slight discrepancy).

DESIGN CYCLE: 12 UX fixes across 5 learn pages — semantic HTML, aria-labels, BackToTop components, TOC nav, 3 OG image path fixes. 4 issues deferred (spacing, focus styles, heading hierarchy, style consistency).
COMMUNITY CYCLE: 5 tweet drafts (#173-177) covering convergence day, SEC ruling, extreme fear signal, new tools, volatility watch. Newsletter v29. SVG social card. Content calendar through Apr 1.
EOD-QA CYCLE: 554 published slugs verified. 103 missing page.tsx (pre-existing). 142 TS errors in 5 files (unchanged). 6/6 API routes healthy. Cache TTLs correct.
BLOCKER [P0]: 157 uncommitted files on main branch (up from 146 last standup, 156 in eod). Growing every cycle. Requires Jefe to trigger commit + push.
BLOCKER [P1]: Disk at 82% (1.8G free) — down from 94G in last standup. VM disk is much smaller than sandbox. Risk of filling during next build cycle.
CARRY-OVER: 4 ecosystem pages missing metadata, rate limiter on 0/6 routes, 154+ TS errors, ~103 legacy slugs missing page.tsx, ~120 learn pages missing OG images.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY (UNCHANGED): 157 uncommitted files must ship. This has been P0 for 2 cycles now. Every hour of delay = missed organic traffic from SEC ruling + options expiry searches. The content exists. The pages are built. They just need git push → Vercel.

PRIORITY 2 — SEC RULING REACTIVE CONTENT: Results will land today. Whichever tokens get approved (or rejected), there's a 4-8 hour window for reactive content that captures search intent. Pre-draft templates for: 'X ETF Approved/Rejected: What It Means', 'Full SEC March 27 ETF Ruling Breakdown'. Build cycle should prioritize this over greenfield pages.

PRIORITY 3 — DISK TRIAGE: 1.8G free is dangerously low for a Next.js project with 500+ pages. If disk fills, all agents halt (same failure mode as Mar 25-26). Clean node_modules cache, prune .next/, remove old report versions to reclaim space before next build cycle.

report.email: SKIPPED — Resend API unreachable from sandbox (curl exit 56, Chrome fetch failed). Network egress blocked. Manual send or external trigger needed.
